sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_zaperson_extend_t (personnelid,zy,workunit,addtime,addoperator) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$zy$','$workunit$','$addtime$','$addoperator$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_extend_t SET zy = '$zy$', workunit = '$workunit$', updateoperator = '$updateoperator$', updatetime = '$updatetime$' WHERE personnelid = $personnelid$
sqlMap.select: select count(*) from p_zaperson_extend_t
select * from p_zaperson_extend_t
select * from p_zaperson_extend_t WHERE personnelid = $personnelid$

SELECT du.id,du.personnelid,du.lssdqk,du.chsj,du.chjg,du.cfjg,du.clxq,du.dbfs,du.dbbw, du.validflag,du.addoperator,du.addtime,du.updateoperator,du.updatetime,du.memo,du.phone, du.person_attribute as personAttribute, du.collect_source as collectSource,du.other_memo as otherMemo, du.home_province as homeProvince,du.home_city as homeCity,du.home_county as homeCounty, du.home_town as homeTown,du.home_police_station_id as homePoliceStationId, d.departname as homePoliceStationName, du.home_detail as homeDetail,du.home_lng as homeLng,du.home_lat as homeLat, du.has_shedu_record as hasSheduRecord,du.handle_unit_code as handleUnitCode, du.collect_date as collectDate,du.case_address_list as caseAddressList, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT aj_rel.aj_id ORDER BY aj_rel.aj_id) AS relAjIds, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT jq_rel.jq_id ORDER BY jq_rel.jq_id) AS relJqIds FROM p_zaperson_du_t du LEFT JOIN sys_department_t_new d ON du.home_police_station_id = d.id AND d.validflag = 1 LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_du_aj_rel_t aj_rel ON du.id = aj_rel.du_id AND aj_rel.validflag = 1 LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_du_jq_rel_t jq_rel ON du.id = jq_rel.du_id AND jq_rel.validflag = 1 WHERE du.personnelid = $personnelid$ AND (du.validflag = 1 OR du.validflag = 2) GROUP BY du.id ORDER BY du.addtime DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT du.id,du.personnelid,du.lssdqk,du.chsj,du.chjg,du.cfjg,du.clxq,du.dbfs,du.dbbw, du.validflag,du.addoperator,du.addtime,du.updateoperator,du.updatetime,du.memo,du.phone, du.person_attribute as personAttribute, du.collect_source as collectSource,du.other_memo as otherMemo, du.home_province as homeProvince,du.home_city as homeCity,du.home_county as homeCounty, du.home_town as homeTown,du.home_police_station_id as homePoliceStationId, d.departname as homePoliceStationName, du.home_detail as homeDetail,du.home_lng as homeLng,du.home_lat as homeLat, du.has_shedu_record as hasSheduRecord,du.handle_unit_code as handleUnitCode, du.collect_date as collectDate,du.case_address_list as caseAddressList, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT aj_rel.aj_id ORDER BY aj_rel.aj_id) AS relAjIds, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT jq_rel.jq_id ORDER BY jq_rel.jq_id) AS relJqIds FROM p_zaperson_du_t du LEFT JOIN sys_department_t_new d ON du.home_police_station_id = d.id AND d.validflag = 1 LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_du_aj_rel_t aj_rel ON du.id = aj_rel.du_id AND aj_rel.validflag = 1 LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_du_jq_rel_t jq_rel ON du.id = jq_rel.du_id AND jq_rel.validflag = 1 WHERE du.id = #value# GROUP BY du.id
select count(*) from p_zaperson_du_t WHERE validflag >0 AND personnelid = $personnelid$

select du.id,du.personnelid,du.lssdqk,du.chsj,du.chjg,du.cfjg,du.clxq,du.dbfs,du.dbbw, du.validflag,du.addoperator,du.addtime,du.memo,du.phone, du.person_attribute as personAttribute, du.collect_source as collectSource,du.other_memo as otherMemo, du.home_province as homeProvince,du.home_city as homeCity,du.home_county as homeCounty, du.home_town as homeTown,du.home_police_station_id as homePoliceStationId, d.departname as homePoliceStationName, du.home_detail as homeDetail,du.home_lng as homeLng,du.home_lat as homeLat, du.has_shedu_record as hasSheduRecord,du.handle_unit_code as handleUnitCode, du.collect_date as collectDate,du.case_address_list as caseAddressList, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT aj_rel.aj_id ORDER BY aj_rel.aj_id) AS relAjIds, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT jq_rel.jq_id ORDER BY jq_rel.jq_id) AS relJqIds from p_zaperson_du_t du LEFT JOIN sys_department_t_new d ON du.home_police_station_id = d.id AND d.validflag = 1 LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_du_aj_rel_t aj_rel ON du.id = aj_rel.du_id AND aj_rel.validflag = 1 LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_du_jq_rel_t jq_rel ON du.id = jq_rel.du_id AND jq_rel.validflag = 1 WHERE du.validflag >0 AND du.personnelid = $personnelid$ GROUP BY du.id order by du.id desc
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_zaperson_du_t (personnelid,lssdqk,chsj,chjg,cfjg,clxq,dbfs,dbbw, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo,phone, person_attribute,collect_source,other_memo, home_province,home_city,home_county,home_town,home_police_station_id, home_detail,home_lng,home_lat,has_shedu_record,handle_unit_code,collect_date,case_address_list) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$lssdqk$','$chsj$','$chjg$','$cfjg$','$clxq$','$dbfs$','$dbbw$', $validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$','$phone$', '$personAttribute$','$collectSource$','$otherMemo$', '$homeProvince$','$homeCity$','$homeCounty$','$homeTown$',#homePoliceStationId#, '$homeDetail$','$homeLng$','$homeLat$',$hasSheduRecord$,'$handleUnitCode$','$collectDate$','$caseAddressList$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_du_t SET lssdqk='$lssdqk$', chsj='$chsj$', chjg='$chjg$', cfjg='$cfjg$', clxq='$clxq$', dbfs='$dbfs$', dbbw='$dbbw$', person_attribute='$personAttribute$', collect_source='$collectSource$', other_memo='$otherMemo$', home_province='$homeProvince$', home_city='$homeCity$', home_county='$homeCounty$', home_town='$homeTown$', home_police_station_id=#homePoliceStationId#, home_detail='$homeDetail$', home_lng='$homeLng$', home_lat='$homeLat$', phone='$phone$', handle_unit_code='$handleUnitCode$', case_address_list='$caseAddressList$', collect_date='$collectDate$', validflag=$validflag$, updateoperator='$updateoperator$', updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT c.id,c.personnelid,c.chang_lsscqk,c.chang_scjs,c.chang_scbw,c.chang_myfs, c.chang_chsj,c.chang_chjg,c.chang_cfjg,c.chang_clxq, c.validflag,c.addoperator,c.addtime,c.updateoperator,c.updatetime,c.memo,c.phone, c.chang_type as changType, c.collect_source as collectSource,c.other_memo as otherMemo,c.is_minor_case as isMinorCase, c.home_province as homeProvince,c.home_city as homeCity,c.home_county as homeCounty, c.home_town as homeTown,c.home_police_station_id as homePoliceStationId, d.departname as homePoliceStationName, c.home_detail as homeDetail,c.home_lng as homeLng,c.home_lat as homeLat, c.has_shechang_record as hasShechangRecord,c.handle_unit_code as handleUnitCode, c.collect_date as collectDate,c.case_address_list as caseAddressList, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT aj_rel.aj_id ORDER BY aj_rel.aj_id) AS relAjIds, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT jq_rel.jq_id ORDER BY jq_rel.jq_id) AS relJqIds FROM p_zaperson_chang_t c LEFT JOIN sys_department_t_new d ON c.home_police_station_id = d.id AND d.validflag = 1 LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_chang_aj_rel_t aj_rel ON c.id = aj_rel.chang_id AND aj_rel.validflag = 1 LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_chang_jq_rel_t jq_rel ON c.id = jq_rel.chang_id AND jq_rel.validflag = 1 WHERE c.personnelid = $personnelid$ AND (c.validflag = 1 OR c.validflag = 2) GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY c.addtime DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT c.id,c.personnelid,c.chang_lsscqk,c.chang_scjs,c.chang_scbw,c.chang_myfs, c.chang_chsj,c.chang_chjg,c.chang_cfjg,c.chang_clxq, c.validflag,c.addoperator,c.addtime,c.updateoperator,c.updatetime,c.memo,c.phone, c.chang_type as changType, c.collect_source as collectSource,c.other_memo as otherMemo,c.is_minor_case as isMinorCase, c.home_province as homeProvince,c.home_city as homeCity,c.home_county as homeCounty, c.home_town as homeTown,c.home_police_station_id as homePoliceStationId, d.departname as homePoliceStationName, c.home_detail as homeDetail,c.home_lng as homeLng,c.home_lat as homeLat, c.has_shechang_record as hasShechangRecord,c.handle_unit_code as handleUnitCode, c.collect_date as collectDate,c.case_address_list as caseAddressList, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT aj_rel.aj_id ORDER BY aj_rel.aj_id) AS relAjIds, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT jq_rel.jq_id ORDER BY jq_rel.jq_id) AS relJqIds FROM p_zaperson_chang_t c LEFT JOIN sys_department_t_new d ON c.home_police_station_id = d.id AND d.validflag = 1 LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_chang_aj_rel_t aj_rel ON c.id = aj_rel.chang_id AND aj_rel.validflag = 1 LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_chang_jq_rel_t jq_rel ON c.id = jq_rel.chang_id AND jq_rel.validflag = 1 WHERE c.id = #value# GROUP BY c.id
select count(*) from p_zaperson_chang_t WHERE validflag >0 AND personnelid = $personnelid$

select c.id,c.personnelid,c.chang_lsscqk,c.chang_scjs,c.chang_scbw,c.chang_myfs, c.chang_chsj,c.chang_chjg,c.chang_cfjg,c.chang_clxq,c.phone, c.validflag,c.addoperator,c.addtime,c.memo, c.chang_type as changType, c.collect_source as collectSource,c.other_memo as otherMemo,c.is_minor_case as isMinorCase, c.home_province as homeProvince,c.home_city as homeCity,c.home_county as homeCounty, c.home_town as homeTown,c.home_police_station_id as homePoliceStationId, d.departname as homePoliceStationName, c.home_detail as homeDetail,c.home_lng as homeLng,c.home_lat as homeLat, c.has_shechang_record as hasShechangRecord,c.handle_unit_code as handleUnitCode, c.collect_date as collectDate,c.case_address_list as caseAddressList, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT aj_rel.aj_id ORDER BY aj_rel.aj_id) AS relAjIds, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT jq_rel.jq_id ORDER BY jq_rel.jq_id) AS relJqIds from p_zaperson_chang_t c LEFT JOIN sys_department_t_new d ON c.home_police_station_id = d.id AND d.validflag = 1 LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_chang_aj_rel_t aj_rel ON c.id = aj_rel.chang_id AND aj_rel.validflag = 1 LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_chang_jq_rel_t jq_rel ON c.id = jq_rel.chang_id AND jq_rel.validflag = 1 WHERE c.validflag >0 AND c.personnelid = $personnelid$ GROUP BY c.id order by c.id desc
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_zaperson_chang_t (personnelid,chang_lsscqk,chang_chsj,chang_chjg,chang_cfjg,chang_clxq,chang_myfs,chang_scbw,chang_scjs, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo,phone, chang_type,collect_source,other_memo,is_minor_case, home_province,home_city,home_county,home_town,home_police_station_id, home_detail,home_lng,home_lat,has_shechang_record,handle_unit_code,collect_date,case_address_list) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$chang_lsscqk$','$chang_chsj$','$chang_chjg$','$chang_cfjg$','$chang_clxq$','$chang_myfs$','$chang_scbw$','$chang_scjs$', $validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$','$phone$', '$changType$','$collectSource$','$otherMemo$',$isMinorCase$, '$homeProvince$','$homeCity$','$homeCounty$','$homeTown$',#homePoliceStationId#, '$homeDetail$','$homeLng$','$homeLat$',$hasShechangRecord$,'$handleUnitCode$','$collectDate$','$caseAddressList$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_chang_t SET chang_lsscqk='$chang_lsscqk$', chang_chsj='$chang_chsj$', chang_chjg='$chang_chjg$', chang_cfjg='$chang_cfjg$', chang_clxq='$chang_clxq$', chang_myfs='$chang_myfs$', chang_scbw='$chang_scbw$', chang_scjs='$chang_scjs$', chang_type='$changType$', collect_source='$collectSource$', other_memo='$otherMemo$', is_minor_case=$isMinorCase$, home_province='$homeProvince$', home_city='$homeCity$', home_county='$homeCounty$', home_town='$homeTown$', home_police_station_id=#homePoliceStationId#, home_detail='$homeDetail$', home_lng='$homeLng$', home_lat='$homeLat$', phone='$phone$', handle_unit_code='$handleUnitCode$', case_address_list='$caseAddressList$', collect_date='$collectDate$', validflag=$validflag$, updateoperator='$updateoperator$', updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT p.id,p.personnelid,p.collect_source as collectSource,p.collect_date as collectDate, p.activity_venue as activityVenue,p.other_memo as otherMemo, p.home_province as homeProvince,p.home_city as homeCity,p.home_county as homeCounty, p.home_town as homeTown,p.home_police_station_id as homePoliceStationId, d.departname as homePoliceStationName, p.home_detail as homeDetail,p.home_lng as homeLng,p.home_lat as homeLat, p.has_shechang_record as hasShechangRecord, p.validflag,p.addoperator,p.addtime,p.updateoperator,p.updatetime,p.memo, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT aj_rel.aj_id ORDER BY aj_rel.aj_id) AS relAjIds, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT jq_rel.jq_id ORDER BY jq_rel.jq_id) AS relJqIds FROM p_zaperson_pei_t p LEFT JOIN sys_department_t_new d ON p.home_police_station_id = d.id AND d.validflag = 1 LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_pei_aj_rel_t aj_rel ON p.id = aj_rel.pei_id AND aj_rel.validflag = 1 LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_pei_jq_rel_t jq_rel ON p.id = jq_rel.pei_id AND jq_rel.validflag = 1 WHERE p.personnelid = $personnelid$ AND (p.validflag = 1 OR p.validflag = 2) GROUP BY p.id ORDER BY p.addtime DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT p.id,p.personnelid,p.collect_source as collectSource,p.collect_date as collectDate, p.activity_venue as activityVenue,p.other_memo as otherMemo, p.home_province as homeProvince,p.home_city as homeCity,p.home_county as homeCounty, p.home_town as homeTown,p.home_police_station_id as homePoliceStationId, d.departname as homePoliceStationName, p.home_detail as homeDetail,p.home_lng as homeLng,p.home_lat as homeLat, p.has_shechang_record as hasShechangRecord, p.validflag,p.addoperator,p.addtime,p.updateoperator,p.updatetime,p.memo, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT aj_rel.aj_id ORDER BY aj_rel.aj_id) AS relAjIds, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT jq_rel.jq_id ORDER BY jq_rel.jq_id) AS relJqIds FROM p_zaperson_pei_t p LEFT JOIN sys_department_t_new d ON p.home_police_station_id = d.id AND d.validflag = 1 LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_pei_aj_rel_t aj_rel ON p.id = aj_rel.pei_id AND aj_rel.validflag = 1 LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_pei_jq_rel_t jq_rel ON p.id = jq_rel.pei_id AND jq_rel.validflag = 1 WHERE p.id = #value# GROUP BY p.id
select count(*) from p_zaperson_pei_t WHERE validflag >0 AND personnelid = $personnelid$

select p.id,p.personnelid,p.collect_source as collectSource,p.collect_date as collectDate, p.activity_venue as activityVenue,p.other_memo as otherMemo, p.home_province as homeProvince,p.home_city as homeCity,p.home_county as homeCounty, p.home_town as homeTown,p.home_police_station_id as homePoliceStationId, d.departname as homePoliceStationName, p.home_detail as homeDetail,p.home_lng as homeLng,p.home_lat as homeLat, p.has_shechang_record as hasShechangRecord, p.validflag,p.addoperator,p.addtime,p.updateoperator,p.updatetime,p.memo, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT aj_rel.aj_id ORDER BY aj_rel.aj_id) AS relAjIds, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT jq_rel.jq_id ORDER BY jq_rel.jq_id) AS relJqIds from p_zaperson_pei_t p LEFT JOIN sys_department_t_new d ON p.home_police_station_id = d.id AND d.validflag = 1 LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_pei_aj_rel_t aj_rel ON p.id = aj_rel.pei_id AND aj_rel.validflag = 1 LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_pei_jq_rel_t jq_rel ON p.id = jq_rel.pei_id AND jq_rel.validflag = 1 WHERE p.validflag >0 AND p.personnelid = $personnelid$ GROUP BY p.id order by p.id desc
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_zaperson_pei_t (personnelid,collect_source,collect_date,activity_venue,other_memo, home_province,home_city,home_county,home_town,home_police_station_id, home_detail,home_lng,home_lat,has_shechang_record, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$collectSource$','$collectDate$','$activityVenue$','$otherMemo$', '$homeProvince$','$homeCity$','$homeCounty$','$homeTown$',#homePoliceStationId#, '$homeDetail$','$homeLng$','$homeLat$',$hasShechangRecord$, $validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_pei_t SET collect_source='$collectSource$', collect_date='$collectDate$', activity_venue='$activityVenue$', other_memo='$otherMemo$', home_province='$homeProvince$', home_city='$homeCity$', home_county='$homeCounty$', home_town='$homeTown$', home_police_station_id=#homePoliceStationId#, home_detail='$homeDetail$', home_lng='$homeLng$', home_lat='$homeLat$', has_shechang_record=$hasShechangRecord$, validflag=$validflag$, updateoperator='$updateoperator$', updatetime='$updatetime$', memo='$memo$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_zaperson_case_address_t (record_id,record_type,province,city,county,town,detail_address,longitude,latitude,validflag,addtime) VALUES ($recordId$,$recordType$,'$province$','$city$','$county$','$town$','$detailAddress$','$longitude$','$latitude$',1,'$addtime$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_case_address_t SET validflag=0 WHERE record_id=$recordId$ AND record_type=$recordType$
sqlMap.select: SELECT id,record_id as recordId,record_type as recordType,province,city,county,town, detail_address as detailAddress,longitude,latitude,validflag,addtime FROM p_zaperson_case_address_t WHERE validflag=1 AND record_id=$recordId$ AND record_type=$recordType$ ORDER BY id ASC
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO p_homeplace_history_t ( personnelid, home_province, home_city, home_county, home_town, home_police_station_id, home_detail, home_lng, home_lat, validflag, addoperator, addtime ) VALUES ( #personnelid#, #province#, #city#, #county#, #town#, #policeStationId#, #detailAddress#, #longitude#, #latitude#, 1, #addoperator#, #addtime# )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
sqlMap.select: SELECT h.id,h.personnelid, h.home_province as province, h.home_city as city, h.home_county as county, h.home_town as town, h.home_police_station_id as policeStationId, d.departname as policeStationName, h.home_detail as detailAddress, h.home_lng as longitude, h.home_lat as latitude, h.validflag,h.addoperator,h.addtime FROM p_homeplace_history_t h LEFT JOIN sys_department_t_new d ON h.home_police_station_id = d.id AND d.validflag = 1 WHERE h.validflag=1 AND h.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY h.addtime DESC
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO p_zaperson_du_aj_rel_t (du_id, personnelid, aj_id, sldw, validflag, addtime) VALUES
(#[]​.duId#, #[]​.personnelid#, #[]​.ajId#, #[]​.sldw#, 1, #[]​.addtime#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_du_aj_rel_t SET validflag=0 WHERE du_id=$value$
UPDATE p_zaperson_du_aj_rel_t SET validflag = #validflag# WHERE du_id = #duId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO p_zaperson_du_aj_rel_t (du_id, personnelid, aj_id, validflag, addtime) VALUES (#duId#, #personnelid#, #ajId#, #validflag#, #addtime#)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select: SELECT aj.id, aj.sfzh, aj.xm, aj.jjbh, aj.ajlb, aj.ajmc, aj.slsj, aj.sldw, aj.sldwmc, aj.jyaq, aj.flag, aj.insert_time, clcs.JDSJ AS cfrq, dic.item AS cfqk FROM f_xt_xd_ajxx_new aj JOIN p_zaperson_du_aj_rel_t r ON aj.id = r.aj_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT GMSFHM, AJBH, JDSJ, JDJG FROM t_xjw_aj_clcs_jgzxb t1 WHERE JDSJ = ( SELECT MAX(JDSJ) FROM t_xjw_aj_clcs_jgzxb t2 WHERE t2.GMSFHM = t1.GMSFHM AND t2.AJBH = t1.AJBH ) ) clcs ON clcs.GMSFHM = aj.sfzh AND clcs.AJBH = aj.jjbh LEFT JOIN f_xt_ajxx_dic dic ON dic.code = clcs.JDJG WHERE r.du_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT d.* FROM p_zaperson_du_t d JOIN p_zaperson_du_aj_rel_t r ON d.id = r.du_id WHERE r.aj_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1

SELECT DISTINCT aj.id, aj.sfzh, aj.xm, aj.jjbh, aj.ajlb, aj.ajmc, aj.slsj, aj.sldw, aj.sldwmc, aj.jyaq, aj.flag, aj.insert_time, clcs.JDSJ AS cfrq, dic.item AS cfqk FROM f_xt_xd_ajxx_new aj JOIN p_zaperson_du_aj_rel_t r ON aj.id = r.aj_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT GMSFHM, AJBH, JDSJ, JDJG FROM t_xjw_aj_clcs_jgzxb t1 WHERE JDSJ = ( SELECT MAX(JDSJ) FROM t_xjw_aj_clcs_jgzxb t2 WHERE t2.GMSFHM = t1.GMSFHM AND t2.AJBH = t1.AJBH ) ) clcs ON clcs.GMSFHM = aj.sfzh AND clcs.AJBH = aj.jjbh LEFT JOIN f_xt_ajxx_dic dic ON dic.code = clcs.JDJG WHERE r.personnelid = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO p_zaperson_du_jq_rel_t (du_id, personnelid, jq_id, cjdw, validflag, addtime) VALUES
(#[]​.duId#, #[]​.personnelid#, #[]​.jqId#, #[]​.cjdw#, 1, #[]​.addtime#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_du_jq_rel_t SET validflag=0 WHERE du_id=$value$
UPDATE p_zaperson_du_jq_rel_t SET validflag = #validflag# WHERE du_id = #duId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO p_zaperson_du_jq_rel_t (du_id, personnelid, jq_id, validflag, addtime) VALUES (#duId#, #personnelid#, #jqId#, #validflag#, #addtime#)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select: SELECT jq.* FROM f_xt_xd_jqxx_new jq JOIN p_zaperson_du_jq_rel_t r ON jq.id = r.jq_id WHERE r.du_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT d.* FROM p_zaperson_du_t d JOIN p_zaperson_du_jq_rel_t r ON d.id = r.du_id WHERE r.jq_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT DISTINCT jq.* FROM f_xt_xd_jqxx_new jq JOIN p_zaperson_du_jq_rel_t r ON jq.id = r.jq_id WHERE r.personnelid = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO p_zaperson_chang_aj_rel_t (chang_id, personnelid, aj_id, sldw, validflag, addtime) VALUES
(#[]​.changId#, #[]​.personnelid#, #[]​.ajId#, #[]​.sldw#, 1, #[]​.addtime#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_chang_aj_rel_t SET validflag=0 WHERE chang_id=$value$
UPDATE p_zaperson_chang_aj_rel_t SET validflag = #validflag# WHERE chang_id = #changId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO p_zaperson_chang_aj_rel_t (chang_id, personnelid, aj_id, validflag, addtime) VALUES (#changId#, #personnelid#, #ajId#, #validflag#, #addtime#)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select: SELECT aj.id, aj.sfzh, aj.xm, aj.jjbh, aj.ajlb, aj.ajmc, aj.slsj, aj.sldw, aj.sldwmc, aj.jyaq, aj.flag, aj.insert_time, clcs.JDSJ AS cfrq, dic.item AS cfqk FROM f_xt_xd_ajxx_new aj JOIN p_zaperson_chang_aj_rel_t r ON aj.id = r.aj_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT GMSFHM, AJBH, JDSJ, JDJG FROM t_xjw_aj_clcs_jgzxb t1 WHERE JDSJ = ( SELECT MAX(JDSJ) FROM t_xjw_aj_clcs_jgzxb t2 WHERE t2.GMSFHM = t1.GMSFHM AND t2.AJBH = t1.AJBH ) ) clcs ON clcs.GMSFHM = aj.sfzh AND clcs.AJBH = aj.jjbh LEFT JOIN f_xt_ajxx_dic dic ON dic.code = clcs.JDJG WHERE r.chang_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT c.* FROM p_zaperson_chang_t c JOIN p_zaperson_chang_aj_rel_t r ON c.id = r.chang_id WHERE r.aj_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1

SELECT DISTINCT aj.id, aj.sfzh, aj.xm, aj.jjbh, aj.ajlb, aj.ajmc, aj.slsj, aj.sldw, aj.sldwmc, aj.jyaq, aj.flag, aj.insert_time, clcs.JDSJ AS cfrq, dic.item AS cfqk FROM f_xt_xd_ajxx_new aj JOIN p_zaperson_chang_aj_rel_t r ON aj.id = r.aj_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT GMSFHM, AJBH, JDSJ, JDJG FROM t_xjw_aj_clcs_jgzxb t1 WHERE JDSJ = ( SELECT MAX(JDSJ) FROM t_xjw_aj_clcs_jgzxb t2 WHERE t2.GMSFHM = t1.GMSFHM AND t2.AJBH = t1.AJBH ) ) clcs ON clcs.GMSFHM = aj.sfzh AND clcs.AJBH = aj.jjbh LEFT JOIN f_xt_ajxx_dic dic ON dic.code = clcs.JDJG WHERE r.personnelid = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO p_zaperson_chang_jq_rel_t (chang_id, personnelid, jq_id, cjdw, validflag, addtime) VALUES
(#[]​.changId#, #[]​.personnelid#, #[]​.jqId#, #[]​.cjdw#, 1, #[]​.addtime#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_chang_jq_rel_t SET validflag=0 WHERE chang_id=$value$
UPDATE p_zaperson_chang_jq_rel_t SET validflag = #validflag# WHERE chang_id = #changId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO p_zaperson_chang_jq_rel_t (chang_id, personnelid, jq_id, validflag, addtime) VALUES (#changId#, #personnelid#, #jqId#, #validflag#, #addtime#)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select: SELECT jq.* FROM f_xt_xd_jqxx_new jq JOIN p_zaperson_chang_jq_rel_t r ON jq.id = r.jq_id WHERE r.chang_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT c.* FROM p_zaperson_chang_t c JOIN p_zaperson_chang_jq_rel_t r ON c.id = r.chang_id WHERE r.jq_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT DISTINCT jq.* FROM f_xt_xd_jqxx_new jq JOIN p_zaperson_chang_jq_rel_t r ON jq.id = r.jq_id WHERE r.personnelid = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO p_zaperson_pei_aj_rel_t (pei_id, personnelid, aj_id, sldw, validflag, addtime) VALUES
(#[]​.peiId#, #[]​.personnelid#, #[]​.ajId#, #[]​.sldw#, 1, #[]​.addtime#)
INSERT INTO p_zaperson_pei_aj_rel_t (pei_id, personnelid, aj_id, validflag, addtime) VALUES (#peiId#, #personnelid#, #ajId#, 1, #addtime#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_pei_aj_rel_t SET validflag=0 WHERE pei_id=$value$
UPDATE p_zaperson_pei_aj_rel_t SET validflag = #validflag# WHERE pei_id = #peiId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT aj.id, aj.sfzh, aj.xm, aj.jjbh, aj.ajlb, aj.ajmc, aj.slsj, aj.sldw, aj.sldwmc, aj.jyaq, aj.flag, aj.insert_time, clcs.JDSJ AS cfrq, dic.item AS cfqk FROM f_xt_xd_ajxx_new aj JOIN p_zaperson_pei_aj_rel_t r ON aj.id = r.aj_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT GMSFHM, AJBH, JDSJ, JDJG FROM t_xjw_aj_clcs_jgzxb t1 WHERE JDSJ = ( SELECT MAX(JDSJ) FROM t_xjw_aj_clcs_jgzxb t2 WHERE t2.GMSFHM = t1.GMSFHM AND t2.AJBH = t1.AJBH ) ) clcs ON clcs.GMSFHM = aj.sfzh AND clcs.AJBH = aj.jjbh LEFT JOIN f_xt_ajxx_dic dic ON dic.code = clcs.JDJG WHERE r.pei_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT p.* FROM p_zaperson_pei_t p JOIN p_zaperson_pei_aj_rel_t r ON p.id = r.pei_id WHERE r.aj_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1

SELECT DISTINCT aj.id, aj.sfzh, aj.xm, aj.jjbh, aj.ajlb, aj.ajmc, aj.slsj, aj.sldw, aj.sldwmc, aj.jyaq, aj.flag, aj.insert_time, clcs.JDSJ AS cfrq, dic.item AS cfqk FROM f_xt_xd_ajxx_new aj JOIN p_zaperson_pei_aj_rel_t r ON aj.id = r.aj_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT GMSFHM, AJBH, JDSJ, JDJG FROM t_xjw_aj_clcs_jgzxb t1 WHERE JDSJ = ( SELECT MAX(JDSJ) FROM t_xjw_aj_clcs_jgzxb t2 WHERE t2.GMSFHM = t1.GMSFHM AND t2.AJBH = t1.AJBH ) ) clcs ON clcs.GMSFHM = aj.sfzh AND clcs.AJBH = aj.jjbh LEFT JOIN f_xt_ajxx_dic dic ON dic.code = clcs.JDJG WHERE r.personnelid = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_zaperson_pei_jq_rel_t (pei_id, personnelid, jq_id, validflag, addtime) VALUES (#peiId#, #personnelid#, #jqId#, 1, #addtime#)

INSERT INTO p_zaperson_pei_jq_rel_t (pei_id, personnelid, jq_id, cjdw, validflag, addtime) VALUES
(#[]​.peiId#, #[]​.personnelid#, #[]​.jqId#, #[]​.cjdw#, 1, #[]​.addtime#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_pei_jq_rel_t SET validflag=0 WHERE pei_id=$value$
UPDATE p_zaperson_pei_jq_rel_t SET validflag = #validflag# WHERE pei_id = #peiId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT jq.* FROM f_xt_xd_jqxx_new jq JOIN p_zaperson_pei_jq_rel_t r ON jq.id = r.jq_id WHERE r.pei_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT p.* FROM p_zaperson_pei_t p JOIN p_zaperson_pei_jq_rel_t r ON p.id = r.pei_id WHERE r.jq_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT DISTINCT jq.* FROM f_xt_xd_jqxx_new jq JOIN p_zaperson_pei_jq_rel_t r ON jq.id = r.jq_id WHERE r.personnelid = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT 1 FROM p_zaperson_du_t WHERE personnelid = $value$ AND validflag > 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT 1 FROM p_zaperson_chang_t WHERE personnelid = $value$ AND validflag > 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT 1 FROM p_zaperson_pei_t WHERE personnelid = $value$ AND validflag > 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT du.id, du.personnelid, du.lssdqk, du.chsj, du.chjg, du.cfjg, du.clxq, du.dbfs, du.dbbw, du.validflag, du.addoperator, du.addtime, du.memo, du.phone, du.person_attribute as personAttribute, du.collect_source as collectSource, du.other_memo as otherMemo, du.home_province as homeProvince, du.home_city as homeCity, du.home_county as homeCounty, du.home_town as homeTown, du.home_police_station_id as homePoliceStationId, d.departname as homePoliceStationName, du.home_detail as homeDetail, du.home_lng as homeLng, du.home_lat as homeLat, du.collect_date as collectDate, du.case_address_list as caseAddressList, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(rel.aj_id ORDER BY rel.aj_id SEPARATOR ',') FROM p_zaperson_du_aj_rel_t rel WHERE rel.du_id = du.id AND rel.validflag > 0) as relAjIds FROM p_zaperson_du_t du LEFT JOIN sys_department_t_new d ON du.home_police_station_id = d.id AND d.validflag = 1 WHERE du.validflag > 0 AND FIND_IN_SET(du.personnelid, '$value$') ORDER BY du.personnelid, du.addtime DESC

SELECT c.id, c.personnelid, c.chang_lsscqk, c.chang_scjs, c.chang_scbw, c.chang_myfs, c.chang_chsj, c.chang_chjg, c.chang_cfjg, c.chang_clxq, c.validflag, c.addoperator, c.addtime, c.memo, c.chang_type as changType, c.collect_source as collectSource, c.other_memo as otherMemo, c.is_minor_case as isMinorCase, c.home_province as homeProvince, c.home_city as homeCity, c.home_county as homeCounty, c.home_town as homeTown, c.home_police_station_id as homePoliceStationId, d.departname as homePoliceStationName, c.home_detail as homeDetail, c.home_lng as homeLng, c.home_lat as homeLat,c.phone, c.case_address_list as caseAddressList, c.collect_date as collectDate, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(rel.aj_id ORDER BY rel.aj_id SEPARATOR ',') FROM p_zaperson_chang_aj_rel_t rel WHERE rel.chang_id = c.id AND rel.validflag > 0) as relAjIds FROM p_zaperson_chang_t c LEFT JOIN sys_department_t_new d ON c.home_police_station_id = d.id AND d.validflag = 1 WHERE c.validflag > 0 AND FIND_IN_SET(c.personnelid, '$value$') ORDER BY c.personnelid, c.addtime DESC

SELECT p.id, p.personnelid, p.collect_source as collectSource, p.collect_date as collectDate, p.activity_venue as activityVenue, p.other_memo as otherMemo, p.home_province as homeProvince, p.home_city as homeCity, p.home_county as homeCounty, p.home_town as homeTown, p.home_police_station_id as homePoliceStationId, d.departname as homePoliceStationName, p.home_detail as homeDetail, p.home_lng as homeLng, p.home_lat as homeLat, p.validflag, p.addoperator, p.addtime, p.memo, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(rel.aj_id ORDER BY rel.aj_id SEPARATOR ',') FROM p_zaperson_pei_aj_rel_t rel WHERE rel.pei_id = p.id AND rel.validflag > 0) as relAjIds FROM p_zaperson_pei_t p LEFT JOIN sys_department_t_new d ON p.home_police_station_id = d.id AND d.validflag = 1 WHERE p.validflag > 0 AND FIND_IN_SET(p.personnelid, '$value$') ORDER BY p.personnelid, p.addtime DESC
SELECT DISTINCT personnelid FROM p_zaperson_chang_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND is_minor_case = 1
